ddls:
CREATE TABLE "page_elements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page element */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the page element within the page structure */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Language of the page element */,
  "plugin_type" INTEGER /* Type of plugin used for the page element */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the page element was created */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date and time the page element was last changed */,
  "placeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the placeholder that the page element is associated with */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the page element within the page structure */,
  "numchild" INTEGER /* Number of child elements the page element has */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the page element within the page structure */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent page element */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the page element */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the page element (e.g., published, draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the page element */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the page element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES page_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_plugin_type FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_type") REFERENCES plugin_types ("plugin_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_placeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("placeholder_id") REFERENCES placeholders ("placeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_elements_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_types" (
  "plugin_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin type */,
  "plugin_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin type */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the plugin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placeholders" (
  "placeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placeholder */,
  "placeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the placeholder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the placeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_structure" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "parent_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent page */,
  "url_slug" TEXT /* URL slug for the page */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the page */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the page */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the page was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the page was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_parent_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_page_id") REFERENCES page_structure ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, editor, author) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_element_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "page_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page element that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_element_history_page_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_element_id") REFERENCES page_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_element_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_element_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "page_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page element that the permission applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a parent element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_element_permissions_page_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_element_id") REFERENCES page_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_element_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_structure_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_history_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES page_structure ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_structure_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page that the permission applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a parent page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_permissions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES page_structure ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_structure_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
